title: TÜFAM (Turkish World Philosophy Research and Application Center) Message from the Director
content:
TÜFAM (Turkish World Philosophy Research and Application Center) Message from the Director

"The Bridge of Philosophy from Our Essence to Today"

Philosophy, as an effort to understand and discuss the universe, human beings, life and values, is the main source from which other sciences are born. The ideas emerging from this source have diversified and developed with the contributions of many civilizations throughout history. Philosophy has a power that connects people, societies and ages. The geography we live in has a rich philosophical heritage. In this context, our civilization is a civilization of heart, contemplation and wisdom. Revealing this heritage, recognizing it and introducing it to the masses is of value for today. This effort can also be a source of inspiration in solving today's problems. Turkish World Philosophy Research and Application Center (TÜFAM) was established to study the accumulation of thought in the Turkic world.

Assist. Assoc. Prof. Dr. Ömer OSMANOĞLU

TÜFAM Director
